doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: partial
reason: The document correctly references Rule 5.5 and contains genuine ABA framework elements, but subsection (b)'s detailed restrictions on paralegal activities and subsection (c)'s categorical statements about "no recognized emergency exception"
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The document correctly references Rule 5.5 and contains genuine ABA framework elements, but subsection (b)'s detailed restrictions on paralegal activities and subsection (c)'s categorical statements about "no recognized emergency exception" appear to exceed the actual scope of the Model Rule and reflect interpretive additions not found in official ABA materials.
